sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35068" key="e)nauxe/nios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐναυχένιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n35068.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">on the neck</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">βρόχος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.493</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (Antip. Thess.).</sense> </entryFree>
